requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing — MS CISPR Standards via SIRIM-Accredited Laboratories
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容检测——通过SIRIM认可实验室依据MS CISPR标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容測試——通過SIRIM認可實驗室依據MS CISPR標準

summary.en: EMC compliance for wireless and IoT devices in Malaysia is assessed against MS (Malaysian Standard) standards that largely adopt CISPR and IEC/ISO references. Testing must be conducted by SIRIM QAS International or other SIRIM-accredited laboratories. EMC test evidence is required as part of the MCMC type approval application. CE CISPR or FCC Part 15B test reports may be submitted as supporting evidence but are not automatically accepted as proof of compliance.
summary.zh: 马来西亚无线及物联网设备的EMC合规须依据MS（马来西亚标准）进行评估，该标准大量采纳CISPR及IEC/ISO参考标准。检测须由SIRIM QAS International或其他SIRIM认可实验室进行。EMC检测证据须作为MCMC型式认可申请的组成部分提交。CE CISPR或FCC Part 15B检测报告可作为佐证提交，但不自动等同于合规证明。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞無線及物聯網裝置的EMC合規須依據MS（馬來西亞標準）進行評估，該標準大量採納CISPR及IEC/ISO參考標準。測試須由SIRIM QAS International或其他SIRIM認可實驗室進行。EMC測試證據須作為MCMC型式認可申請的組成部分提交。CE CISPR或FCC Part 15B測試報告可作為佐證提交，但不自動等同於合規證明。

standards_or_laws: MS CISPR 32: Multimedia Equipment — Electromagnetic Emissions Requirements
MS CISPR 35: Multimedia Equipment — Immunity Requirements
MCMC Type Approval — EMC test evidence requirements

summary.en: China requires EMC compliance to GB 9254 (class A/B radiated and conducted emissions for ITE) and GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions) tested at CNAS-accredited laboratories. These GB standards are broadly aligned with CISPR 22/32 and IEC 61000-3-2 but are issued under a distinct Chinese national standard framework and are not directly accepted by SIRIM.
summary.zh: 中国要求依据GB 9254（ITE A/B类辐射和传导骚扰）和GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射）在CNAS认可实验室完成EMC合规检测。这些GB标准与CISPR 22/32及IEC 61000-3-2大体一致，但以独立的中国国家标准体系发布，SIRIM不直接接受。
summary.zht: 中國要求依據GB 9254（ITE A/B類輻射和傳導騷擾）和GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射）在CNAS認可實驗室完成EMC合規測試。這些GB標準與CISPR 22/32及IEC 61000-3-2大體一致，但以獨立的中國國家標準體系發布，SIRIM不直接接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information Technology Equipment: Radio Disturbance Characteristics
GB 17625.1-2022 — Electromagnetic Compatibility: Limits for Harmonic Current Emissions
CCC EMC requirements under CNCA framework

gap.en: Chinese GB-based EMC test reports from CNAS labs are generally not directly accepted by SIRIM as standalone proof of compliance. Separate re-testing at a SIRIM-accredited laboratory to MS CISPR standards is typically required. CE CISPR reports from EU-notified bodies may be presented as supporting evidence but require MCMC/SIRIM review before acceptance.
gap.zh: CNAS实验室出具的基于GB标准的中国EMC检测报告，通常不被SIRIM直接接受作为独立合规证明。一般须在SIRIM认可实验室按MS CISPR标准另行重新检测。来自欧盟公告机构的CE CISPR报告可作为佐证提交，但须经MCMC/SIRIM审查方可接受。
gap.zht: CNAS實驗室出具的基於GB標準的中國EMC測試報告，通常不被SIRIM直接接受作為獨立合規證明。一般須在SIRIM認可實驗室按MS CISPR標準另行重新測試。來自歐盟公告機構的CE CISPR報告可作為佐證提交，但須經MCMC/SIRIM審查方可接受。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 9254 EMC test reports do not substitute for SIRIM-accredited MS CISPR testing. Separate EMC re-testing in a SIRIM-accredited laboratory is required as part of the MCMC type approval process.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 9254 EMC检测报告不能替代SIRIM认可的MS CISPR检测。作为MCMC型式认可流程的一部分，须在SIRIM认可实验室另行进行EMC重新检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 9254 EMC測試報告不能替代SIRIM認可的MS CISPR測試。作為MCMC型式認可流程的一部分，須在SIRIM認可實驗室另行進行EMC重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: MCMC Type Approval Label — Approval Number on Product or Packaging
requirement_topic.zh: MCMC型式认可标签——产品或包装上的批准编号
requirement_topic.zht: MCMC型式認可標籤——產品或包裝上的批准編號

summary.en: Once MCMC type approval is granted, the MCMC approval number must be affixed to the product itself or its retail packaging before the device can be imported or placed on sale in Malaysia. The label format and placement are specified in the MCMC type approval certificate conditions. Devices without the MCMC label are not permitted to enter Malaysian commerce.
summary.zh: 一旦取得MCMC型式认可，MCMC批准编号须于设备进口或在马来西亚上市前标贴于产品本身或其零售包装上。标签格式和位置由MCMC型式认可证书条件规定。未贴MCMC标签的设备不得进入马来西亚流通领域。
summary.zht: 一旦取得MCMC型式認可，MCMC批准編號須於裝置進口或在馬來西亞上市前標貼於產品本身或其零售包裝上。標籤格式和位置由MCMC型式認可證書條件規定。未貼MCMC標籤的裝置不得進入馬來西亞流通領域。

standards_or_laws: Communications and Multimedia Act 1998 (Act 588) — equipment labelling provisions
MCMC Type Approval Certificate conditions — label requirements

summary.en: China requires SRRC approval number to be marked on the product for intentional radiators; network terminal equipment must display the MIIT NAL number. CCC-marked products must carry the CCC mark. These are Chinese domestic labels entirely separate from the Malaysian MCMC label requirement.
summary.zh: 中国对有意辐射体要求将SRRC批准编号标注于产品上；网络终端设备须显示工信部NAL编号。CCC认证产品须标注CCC标志。这些均为中国境内标签，与马来西亚MCMC标签要求完全独立。
summary.zht: 中國對有意輻射體要求將SRRC批准編號標注於產品上；網路終端設備須顯示工信部NAL編號。CCC認證產品須標注CCC標誌。這些均為中國境內標籤，與馬來西亞MCMC標籤要求完全獨立。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval labelling — MIIT/SRRC requirements
CCC mark requirements — CNCA administrative regulations
MIIT NAL label requirements for telecom terminal equipment

gap.en: The MCMC label with the Malaysian approval number is a distinct requirement with no equivalence to SRRC, NAL, CE, or CCC marks. Product artwork and packaging must be revised to include the MCMC approval number before shipment to Malaysia. Devices bearing only Chinese certification marks cannot be sold in Malaysia.
gap.zh: 带有马来西亚批准编号的MCMC标签是独立要求，与SRRC、NAL、CE或CCC标志不存在等效关系。产品图文和包装须在发货至马来西亚前进行修订，以包含MCMC批准编号。仅标注中国认证标志的设备不能在马来西亚销售。
gap.zht: 帶有馬來西亞批准編號的MCMC標籤是獨立要求，與SRRC、NAL、CE或CCC標誌不存在等效關係。產品圖文和包裝須在發貨至馬來西亞前進行修訂，以包含MCMC批准編號。僅標注中國認證標誌的裝置不能在馬來西亞銷售。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Malaysian-specific MCMC approval number label is mandatory on product or packaging. Existing Chinese SRRC, NAL, or CCC label marks do not satisfy this requirement. Product label and packaging artwork must be updated before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 产品或包装上须强制标注马来西亚专用MCMC批准编号标签。现有中国SRRC、NAL或CCC标签标志不满足此要求。须在进口前更新产品标签及包装图文。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 產品或包裝上須強制標注馬來西亞專用MCMC批准編號標籤。現有中國SRRC、NAL或CCC標籤標誌不滿足此要求。須在進口前更新產品標籤及包裝圖文。
